All work is complete and committed. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary **Implemented** — created two files in the repository root exactly per the plan: - `about.html` — HTML5 page with `lang="en"`, `About — Hula`, viewport meta, `

Welcome to Hula

`, the description `

`, and a `` to `about.css`. Semantic `

` wrapper. - `about.css` — CSS reset, flex-centered body, `max-width: 600px` centered `
`, typography (h1 2.5rem, p 1.125rem `#6b7280`). **Verified** (all 8 acceptance criteria): - AC1/AC5: both files exist in repo root ✓ - AC2: title is exactly `About — Hula` ✓ - AC3: `

Welcome to Hula

` ✓ - AC4: description `

` present ✓ - AC6: responsive — viewport meta present, `padding`+`max-width` prevent overflow ✓ - AC7: no external resources (grep for http/script/cdn/fonts → none) ✓ - AC8: plain static files → GitHub Pages serves `/about.html` directly ✓ - HTML parses cleanly; CSS braces balanced. **Note on verification commands:** `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, `pnpm check`, and the IVR simulator steps from ralph.md **do not apply** to this task. This repo is a plain static HTML project — there is no `package.json`, no Node/TypeScript project, no IVR code, and no build tooling (repo root contained only `ralph.md`, `ralph-run.sh`, `.hublaunch/`, `.git/`, and an empty `test` file). There is nothing to compile or lint. The plan itself explicitly scopes this as "plain HTML5 + CSS3, no JavaScript, no npm, no framework, no build tooling." I verified the static output directly instead. **Committed:** `a0a7e1b` (about.html + about.css). Lessons file updated for future sessions.
